category_sources: Official repository summary also identifies hey as an HTTP load generator.
source_facts.description says hey is an HTTP load generator and ApacheBench replacement.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official rakyll/hey repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; its README is the best available documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/rakyll/hey; per instructions repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies HTTP load generation and ApacheBench replacement behavior.
